records.expectation: authenticated MCP status

result.message: Fabric loaded without a running world

records.expectation: typed capability discovery

reason.message: The audited Vibecraft source does not ship building_patterns_structured.json; metadata-only patterns cannot be placed safely.

capabilities.documentation: Expose Vibecraft's place_building_pattern contract without inventing executable layer data that the audited upstream source does not ship.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: Expand one hash-pinned Vibecraft furniture layout into a bounded native block-write batch with rotation and dry-run preview.
Calculate deterministic bounded coordinates for Vibecraft-compatible circles (radius <=100), spheres (radius <=25), domes (radius <=48), ellipses, and arches without touching a world.
Get one capability descriptor by stable ID.
List all negotiated capabilities, including unavailable and restricted states, with an optional bounded query filter.
Search capability descriptors by ID, namespace, or documentation.
Return the negotiated Lodestone protocol, session, adapter, and capability state.
Return runtime, adapter, session, and event queue health.

reason.message: UI interaction requires explicit player-control authorization.

capabilities.documentation: Navigate a known Minecraft menu target through a fresh semantic UI snapshot and revision-guarded click; labels are locale-dependent and ambiguity is rejected.
Asynchronously poll the negotiated UI state until the requested in-world or screen condition is true. timeoutMs defaults to 30000 and pollIntervalMs defaults to 500.

Locally inspect decoded WorldEdit mask text using Lodestone's conservative WorldEdit 7.4 structural subset. valid and locallyAccepted mean only local structural-policy acceptance, never server, registry, plugin, or semantic acceptance. Expressions are lexical-only; assignments, control flow, shifts, and zero-argument calls are intentionally outside this subset. No command is executed or suggested; server validation is always required.

reason.message: This operation is not implemented by the Fabric 1.21.1 adapter yet.

capabilities.documentation: Read a non-destructive bounded snapshot of captured client chat messages.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: Broadcast a bounded user-visible chat message. A deadline after broadcast reports an indeterminate outcome and must not be retried automatically.

Capture the current client framebuffer, including title and menu screens, as a bounded PNG with caller-isolated, publication-time artifact metadata; omitted maximums default to 1920 by 1080 and player position and rotation are optional when no player exists.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: Discover commands from the live native command registry, including arguments and permission context.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: Execute an authorized arbitrary server command. This can mutate or stop the server and requires administer-server authorization; a deadline after irreversible dispatch reports an indeterminate outcome and must not be retried automatically.

reason.message: This operation is not implemented by the Fabric 1.21.1 adapter yet.

capabilities.documentation: Execute an arbitrary server command through authenticated RCON. A deadline after dispatch reports an indeterminate outcome and must not be retried automatically.

reason.message: This client capability requires a physical client, player, world, or screen that is not currently available.

capabilities.documentation: Interact with a loaded client entity by numeric ID and optional hand.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: List loaded overworld entities with bounded type and player filters. This query does not load chunks or scan unloaded regions.

reason.message: This client capability requires a physical client, player, world, or screen that is not currently available.

capabilities.documentation: List nearby loaded client entities nearest-first with stable tie-breaking, numeric interaction IDs, and explicit truncation.
Drain at most 1000 caller-owned events (default 100). Delivery is at-most-once: a response lost after draining may consume events, so callers must not assume the batch remains queued.

Create a bounded event subscription. eventPrefix defaults to all deliverable events and bufferLimit defaults to 256. Raw minecraft.input.* events are redacted until per-event authorization is available. A deadline after allocation reports an indeterminate outcome.
Remove a caller-owned event subscription and release its bounded buffer. A deadline after removal reports an indeterminate outcome.

reason.message: Requires a client-capable adapter and explicit player-control authorization.

capabilities.documentation: Set a logical key-binding state without conflating it with physical input emulation.

reason.message: Requires a client-capable adapter and explicit player-control authorization.

capabilities.documentation: Set a bounded logical mouse binding state through a client adapter; provide key or button.

reason.message: Requires a client-capable adapter and explicit player-control authorization.

capabilities.documentation: Release every Lodestone-controlled logical input and invalidate outstanding movement leases.

reason.message: Container mutation is default-deny and requires explicit player-control authorization.

capabilities.documentation: Perform a bounded container click only when the supplied revision matches the active container.
Read the active client container with stable slot indices and a server revision suitable for guarded follow-up clicks.

reason.message: This operation is not implemented by the Fabric 1.21.1 adapter yet.

capabilities.documentation: Request bounded crafting by item identifier and count; unavailable until a native inventory or crafting-table actor is implemented.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: Read a server player's inventory slots with stable slot indices. Open-container projections and client-only inventory state remain separate capabilities.

reason.message: This client capability requires a physical client, player, world, or screen that is not currently available.

capabilities.documentation: Select a hotbar slot from 0 through 8.

reason.message: This operation is not implemented by the Fabric 1.21.1 adapter yet.

capabilities.documentation: Execute one command as an exact online player so native permission and actor-scoped plugin state are preserved; capture completeness is explicit and bounded.

capabilities.documentation: Read normalized player identity, position, rotation, health, food, and optional selected-slot state.
Search the live negotiated item registry, including modded entries, with deterministic bounded results.
Read structured negotiated game, loader, connection, world, difficulty, time, and bounded player information.

reason.message: UI interaction requires explicit player-control authorization.

capabilities.documentation: Click exactly one semantic or coordinate target only when screenToken and snapshotRevision match the active bounded snapshot; button defaults to primary (0).

reason.message: UI key input requires explicit player-control authorization.

capabilities.documentation: Send a native key, scan-code, and modifier tuple to the active screen. Adapters may additionally return openedPause=true when Escape opens a guarded pause screen from an active singleplayer world; the field is optional for compatibility with adapters that only report handled.
Read a bounded, typed semantic projection of the current client screen with stable concurrency tokens and explicit coverage metadata.

reason.message: Text insertion requires explicit player-control authorization.

capabilities.documentation: Insert up to 4096 characters into the focused text field.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: Read a normalized block ID and loaded state without loading an unloaded chunk; loaded blocks may also expose canonical state and air fields.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: Read a bounded overworld block volume. Each request is limited to 32x32x32 cells and returns normalized block IDs without loading unloaded chunks.

reason.message: The adapter is loaded, but no logical server/world is running.

capabilities.documentation: Perform up to 64 validated overworld block writes. Dry-run validates and reports the previous state without changing the world; NBT and non-overworld dimensions are not supported by this adapter slice.

capabilities.documentation: Read deterministic loaded-column height data without loading chunks; unloaded and empty columns remain explicitly distinguishable.

reason.message: This client capability requires a physical client, player, world, or screen that is not currently available.

capabilities.documentation: Analyze loaded-world sky and block light with deterministic sampling, real emission detection, bounded findings, and no chunk loads.

capabilities.documentation: Scan a bounded overworld volume without loading chunks and return block-frequency counts plus loaded/unloaded cell totals.
